item.body:
## What's Changed
### OPC UA - **Workspace remembers the full pane arrangement** â€” Save/Load now restores where every panel sits, including floating, pinned, and splitter positions.
### Bug Fixes - **AI Chat** â€” Context compaction â€” safety-critical tool results (deletions, test runs, compilations) are preserved verbatim through compaction instead of being truncated. - **S7 driver** â€” Connection reliability and stability improvements. - **SCL Unit Testing** â€” PLCSIM Advanced transport reliability and diagnostic improvements. - **AI Chat settings** â€” API Key field reliably appears when a provider needs one. - **AI Chat** â€” Ctrl+B sub-agent backgrounding works reliably in all chat contexts. - **AI Chat** â€” Stalled responses surface as a clear error instead of hanging; timeouts are tuned per model so long-thinking assistants still complete. - **AI Chat** â€” Context handling on long conversations is more reliable, with automatic recovery when a request grows too large. - **AI Chat** â€” Describe Project and Document Project run more reliably on very large projects and resume cleanly after an interruption.
